name: scope-guard
description: Scoped coding partner: enforce scope, single-purpose design, pseudocode review, and documentation deltas before and during implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Scoped coding partner: scope, design, pseudocode review, and doc deltas before implementation.
interface.longDescription: Scope Guard keeps coding agents disciplined before and during implementation. It enforces a structured lifecycle - clarify scope, define in/out of scope, propose a single-purpose extensible design, write pseudocode, review the pseudocode, and only then implement - then requires a documentation and diagram delta after the change. A deterministic validator (scope-guard.mjs) blocks vague goals, missing scope boundaries, components that bundle multiple responsibilities, implementation before approved pseudocode, missing tests, and stale documentation.
defaultPrompt: Run the scope-guard workflow before implementation.
Clarify scope, define in and out of scope, and propose single-purpose components.
Write and review pseudocode, then validate the plan before implementing.
After implementation, record the design doc and diagram delta and run the final check.
